title: Undo option for any action on monday
excerpt:
Accidents/slip of the fingers/mistakes happen! 
An undo option that is somewhere at all times for any action (In your workspace, board, item, subitem, etc.) 
Just like in microsoft office programs! 
That would be amazing…

posts.author: amymo (Amelia Moser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Accidents/slip of the fingers/mistakes happen!
An undo option that is somewhere at all times for any action (In your workspace, board, item, subitem, etc.)
Just like in microsoft office programs!
That would be amazing, and such an anxiety reliever!
